title: Swift Wheel
description: The next generation fast switch mod.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d21ecf6174c1c4e179c8c0abcd3c59b237800156.png)
# Swift Wheel Mod - Enhanced Inventory Management for Minecraft

**Swift Wheel** is a versatile client-side utility mod designed to revolutionize your Minecraft inventory management experience. This innovative mod introduces a dynamic item wheel interface that allows players to quickly access and select items from their inventory without tedious scrolling or hotbar swapping.

![ingame preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54dd6691517481eaa0efb688aef0850d3f5045a4_0.webp)


## Usage

Simply bind a hotkey to activate the item wheel, then hover over your desired category to quickly equip or use items. You are also allowed to right click into the specified item list for every category.Perfect for combat situations, building projects, and any scenario where every second counts!

![ingame preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33b19c5c10589ddb8c4d8aa0df2df84c9259ff93_0.webp)

## Keybinds Notice

While holding the hotkey (default: "X"), standard mouse interactions are temporarily disabled. Left-click a category or release the hotkey to confirm your selection. Alternatively, right-click any category to enter Item List Mode, displaying all available items within that category. In this mode, middle-clicking an item reveals its detailed information.

![ingame preview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d733ecedd0be9d2fc8d260ccb6011e39e70a2d52_0.webp)

### Compatibility

Works with Forge only presently. Supports 1.20x game versions.





### Configuration

Customize visible categories and rendering preferences through the mod's configuration file located at ".minecraft/config/swiftwheel-client.toml"
